domain: Mobile App UI for Premium Music Festival / Lifestyle in Cartagena
vibe: Moody, tropical luxury, rhythmic tension, high-end nightlife

components.navigation_tab_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050814]/70 border-t border-white/10 pb-safe pt-4 px-6 flex justify-between
components.event_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-[#0F1423] border border-white/5
components.button_primary: bg-[#D97706] text-white hover:bg-[#F59E0B] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
components.filter_chip: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/20 text-sm hover:bg-white/10

instructions_to_main_agent: Design a mobile-first UI wrapper (Progressive Web App / Web-based Mobile Simulator) considering this is meant for a mobile environment but rendered here via React JS + Tailwind.
Do not use generic Inter font. Apply Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text. Enforce tracking and leading adjustments.
Create a fixed bottom navigation tab bar mimicking mobile UX (Home, Agenda, Mapa, Partners, Perfil). Ensure enough padding at the bottom of main content so it is not hidden.
Use 'hero_background' for the main 'What to do today' hero header area, overlaying it with bg-black/50 to guarantee text readability.
For the 'Official Agenda', implement sleek glassmorphism or 1px border cards over the dark theme.
Integrate the 'beach_club' image into the curated lifestyle itinerary card.
Incorporate the 'texture_overlay' in specific areas (e.g., user profile header or high-end certified partners section) for depth.
Do NOT use teal blue or purple. Instead, rely on Midnight Blue (#050814) for base and Sunset Gold (#D97706) for primary interactive actions.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY interactive element (buttons, tabs, filter chips, booking links).
Ensure 'Certified Partners' show a premium metallic or golden border/seal indicator.
